title: Recent Advancements in the Management of Osteoarthritis: An Updated Review.
snippet: Osteoarthritis (OA) is a long-term progressive degenerative joint disorder that affects a substantial portion of the global population. It is primarily marked by the progressive breakdown of articular cartilage, which results in pain, joint stiffness, and reduced mobility. While the exact mechanisms underlying OA development remain incompletely defined, gro...
